Using `PURCHASEORDERITEMS.asterisk()` fetches all columns from the table, which may include unnecessary data and creates fragile code that breaks when columns are added or removed. Using LIKE with wildcards on both sides ('%query%') for searching patient names and IDs performs a full-text search that cannot use indexes efficiently, leading to slow table scans. Consider using a dedicated full-text search solution (e.g., PostgreSQL's tsvector/tsquery) or a search engine like Elasticsearch.
